scripts.test:coverage:ts: pnpm run verify:node22 && pnpm --filter @homelab/api prisma:generate && pnpm --filter @homelab/shared test:coverage && pnpm --filter @homelab/worker test:coverage && pnpm --filter @homelab/web test:coverage && pnpm --filter @homelab/api exec vitest run --coverage
scripts.test:coverage: pnpm run test:coverage:ts && pnpm run test:coverage:go
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @homelab/api prisma:generate && pnpm --filter @homelab/shared typecheck && pnpm --filter @homelab/worker typecheck && pnpm --filter @homelab/web typecheck && pnpm --filter @homelab/api exec tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.quality:check: pnpm run quality:preflight && pnpm repo:hygiene && pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test
